data.name: Violated Princess
data.detailed_description:
Violated Princess – A Dark & Lewd Survival Roguelike

Thrown into a world of chaos, Princess Aurelia must fight for her survival against relentless waves of monstrous enemies, lecherous beasts, and sinister overlords. In this intense, action-packed roguelike, embrace the thrill of combat as you unlock devastating abilities, evolve your power, and claim your revenge—or succumb to the dangers that await.

Trapped in a cursed kingdom overrun by unholy beasts and sinister nobles, the once-proud princess must fight for her survival—or submit to the twisted fate awaiting her. Violated Princess is an intense, mature-themed roguelike survivor game where waves of relentless enemies threaten to consume both body and soul. Will you embrace the darkness and rise as a powerful warrior, or succumb to the corruption that hungers for you?

🗡 Features 🗡

💎 36 Devastating Abilities – Build your perfect arsenal with:
✦ 12 Active Abilities – Unleash powerful attacks and spells
✦ 12 Passive Abilities – Enhance your strength and resilience
✦ 12 Evolutions – Upgrade abilities into their ultimate forms
✦ Customizable Stats – Fine-tune your abilities to suit your playstyle
✦ In-Game Ability Selector – Choose your path mid-run

🎭 Customize Your Playstyle – Tweak and enhance ability stats to suit your strategy, whether you prefer raw destruction, tactical control, or high-risk, high-reward gameplay.

🔥 Dynamic Combat Effects – Every attack lights up the battlefield with stunning visual effects and handcrafted ability icons. Watch as your power grows with each kill.

🔮 In-Game Ability Selector – Choose wisely! Adapt your build mid-run, unlocking potent abilities that shape your princess’s journey from helpless royalty to an unstoppable force.

👿 Brutal Enemies & Bosses
✦ 14 Animated Foes – A mix of simple and ranged threats
✦ 6 Deadly Bosses – Each with unique mechanics (15 total phases!)
✦ Dynamic Combat – Dodge, strike, and conquer overwhelming odds

💰 Loot, Level, and Survive
✦ 4 XP Gem Tiers – Collect experience to grow stronger
✦ Strategic Drops – Bombs, Magnets, Healing, Coins, and Treasure Chests
✦ Permanent Upgrades – Unlock new strengths and carry power across runs
✦ Upgrade System Includes – Revive, Armor, Damage, Healing, and Max Health

👑 Dark Fantasy & Lewd Undertones – Experience a world steeped in corruption, temptation, and dangerous beauty. Your choices determine whether you conquer the night… or are devoured by it.

🔞 Mature Content Warning
"Violated Princess" blends sensuality, danger, and dark fantasy, featuring adult themes, seductive visuals, and animated encounters. Enter a world where power is taken, pleasure is a weapon, and survival means embracing both.

Are you strong enough to survive the night, or will you become just another violated soul in the princess’s tragic tale?

🔥 Join the adventure now & prepare to fight--of fall! 🔥

data.short_description: Violated Princess is an intense, mature-themed roguelike survivor game where waves of relentless enemies threaten to consume both body and soul
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 1.8 Ghz equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce 1080 and higher ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: integrated or higher
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.4 Ghz equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1080 equivalent or greater ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: integrated or higher

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or higher
  • Processor: 1.8 Ghz equivalent or greater
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce 1080 and higher ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: integrated or higher
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 or higher
  • Processor: 2.4 Ghz equivalent or greater
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1080 equivalent or greater ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: integrated or higher
